_publications._publicationTitle: PET Imaging of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with a Fluorine-18 Labeled Tryptophan Radiotracer.

_contextSnippet: The IHC results showed that the NF1 tumors had high IDO, TDO2, and AHR expressions...while the AHR expression in the muscle was high
resourceName: AHR antibody mouse monoclonal (1:50, Santa Cruz, Dallas, TX, USA)
details: Successfully demonstrated high AHR expression in NF1 tumors and muscle, with differential expression patterns correlating with L-[18F]FETrp uptake
